prompt: Generate a stylized doodle artwork. Use the simple child figures from image 1 but render them in the expressive, detailed doodle style and dense arrangement seen in image 2. Black and white line art.
prompt_refined: Generate a black and white line art image in a stylized doodle artwork. The composition should feature the simple stick figures from image 1, re-imagined with the expressive facial details and varied, organic shapes found in the doodle art style of image 2. Arrange the figures in a dense, interwoven composition that fills the entire frame, mirroring the full-canvas arrangement seen in image 2.
